title: Suppress Work Forms Help Button
excerpt: I am using embedding work forms on my website for Sales Inquiries as well as Support Requests. While I generally like the feature, I need to suppress the “?” button in the forms as it is linked to a monday.com webpage ex…

posts.author: DavidatWISE (David R Currie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using embedding work forms on my website for Sales Inquiries as well as Support Requests. While I generally like the feature, I need to suppress the “?” button in the forms as it is linked to a monday.com webpage explaining how to use work forms. Monday.com branding switch is set to remove Monday.com branding and the button still appears. In terms of implementation, I would think either the suppress branding or a separate switch to control the help button would work for me.

I will have to switch to another forms product if this is not fixed soon. I’m sure this was an oversight, as no-one would want the help button to appear on their site with a link away from their site!
